title: Iranian sea trade blocked as six ships forced to turn back, U.S. military says
summary_full: A U.S. blockade in effect since Monday has completely cut off Iran’s sea trade, the U.S. military said after six merchant ships were prevented from leaving Iranian ports.
summary_public: A U.S. blockade in effect since Monday has completely cut off Iran’s sea trade, the U.S. military said after six merchant ships were prevented from leaving Iranian ports.

IR.label: positive
IR.evidence: Iranian sea trade blocked as six ships forced to turn back
